title: Threefold's Modern Gregtech
body:
Threefold's Modern Gregtech is a fresh new take on the original Gregtech textures. It features many of the core GT components such as: Motors, Conveyors and Robot Arms. Built from the ground up, with the goal of bringing a familiar and consistent look to the modern versions of Gregtech. The resource pack stands on it's own, while taking inspiration from GTCE, GT5U and GTCEu:Modern.

Currently version 0.3 supports [**Gregtech CEu: Modern**](https://modrinth.com/mod/gregtechceu-modern) and has support for the [**Gregtech New Horizons**](https://www.gtnewhorizons.com/) modpack with all tiers implemented from ULV > MAX!

More textures are planned for the future!
